overall.description: First-person exploration through a dystopian industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077. The player character moves from an elevated concrete walkway down to a muddy ground level, navigating between massive megastructures during a hazy sunset with a melee weapon visible.

events.description: begins descending ramp from elevated platform toward ground level
ground surface transitions from concrete platform to dirt terrain

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along elevated concrete walkway, descending ramp at end of segment

entered.detail: massive industrial megabuilding with exposed pipes and scaffolding on left side
large concrete industrial structure with red crane arm on right side
metal and concrete safety barriers lining the elevated walkway edge
futuristic skyscrapers visible through haze on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway between massive industrial structures during golden hour. The camera moves forward along the platform, passing metal railings and concrete barriers, with dystopian megabuildings framing both sides. Toward the end, the path descends via a ramp as the concrete surface gives way to dirt terrain below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial ground level between megabuildings

agents.ego_description: walking through open dirt area between industrial structures with a bladed melee weapon visible in right hand

entered.detail: uneven muddy terrain with tire tracks and scattered debris
bladed weapon held in right hand, visible in lower right corner of frame

segments.scene_description: Now at ground level, the scene opens into a wide dirt field between the megastructures. The concrete walkway and railings are left behind as the camera moves steadily forward across the muddy terrain. A melee weapon is visible in the foreground, and the industrial buildings recede into the mid-ground while the hazy city skyline remains visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated industrial walkway down into a wide, muddy wasteland. It begins by gliding forward along a concrete platform framed by massive dystopian megastructures under the warm glow of the golden hour. As the camera progresses past metal railings and concrete barriers, the path smoothly transitions down a ramp, shifting the perspective from the height of the walkway to the dirt terrain below. The scene then opens into a broad field of mud, where the industrial buildings recede into the mid-ground and a melee weapon becomes visible in the foreground. Finally, the camera moves steadily across the open ground toward a hazy city skyline that looms in the distance.
